name: Bird Neumorphic New Tab
description: Soft neumorphic New Tab: live clock, task boards, notes, and quick access to your bookmarks and open tabs.
author: Bird

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://www.google.com data:; connect-src 'self'
